text.title: Strategy Methods Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 the produced artefact must satisfy. Validator (scripts/validate-strategy-methods.py) enforces required keys + per-field constraints. Forbidden patterns are explicit anti-shapes the validator rejects.

example.note: method not in enum; fit_scores + limitations + decided_by missing.

forbidden.pattern: SWOT chosen by default regardless of context.
